vocab.meaning: sự tập trung toàn tâm toàn ý
vocab.example: Studying in isolation allows me to give my undivided attention to complex mathematical proofs without interruption.

vocab.meaning: khả năng ghi nhớ/duy trì kiến thức
vocab.example: I've noticed that my knowledge retention is significantly higher when I summarize concepts out loud to a study partner.

vocab.meaning: môi trường không có tác nhân gây xao nhãng
vocab.example: I generally opt for the library's silent zone as it provides the distraction-free environment I need for cramming.
There is a synergistic effect when working in a group; the collective brainpower often solves problems much faster than one person could.

vocab.meaning: tự chịu rủi ro (thường dùng khi nói về việc bỏ qua lợi ích của việc học nhóm)
vocab.example: One ignores the benefits of peer feedback at one's own peril, as friends can often spot errors we are blind to.

vocab.meaning: cách hiểu/diễn giải mang tính chủ quan
vocab.example: Collaborative study helps mitigate subjective interpretation of the text, ensuring a more balanced understanding.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự cạnh tranh lành mạnh
vocab.example: Studying with high-achieving peers tends to foster healthy competition, pushing me to exceed my usual limits.

vocab.meaning: sự hài lòng/thỏa mãn về mặt giao tiếp xã hội
vocab.example: While I value productivity, the social gratification of studying with friends makes the process far less tedious.

vocab.meaning: điều chỉnh tốc độ theo ý mình
vocab.example: The primary allure of solitary study is the freedom to tailor one's pace—spending more time on weaknesses and skipping strengths.
Explaining a theory to a classmate is a fantastic way to reinforce learning and ensure I’ve truly mastered the material.
